bead.title: bench: backfill existing cells with embedded metadata
bead.description:
One-shot script that walks benchmark-results/**/cells/, embeds resolved profile metadata into every cell's report.json, and reorganizes paths to the new framework/task/cell-id layout.

For each cell at benchmark-results/<canonical>/cells/<framework-dataset>/<task>/<profile_id>/rep-NNN/report.json:
1. Read existing profile_id and profile_snapshot.
2. Resolve to a current scripts/benchmark/profiles/*.yaml. Apply PROFILE_ALIASES rules from scripts/website/build-benchmark-data.py:150 area for renamed profiles.
3. For the 4 deleted profile IDs, recover the YAML from git history (the commit that deleted it):
   - sindri-club-3090
   - vidar-qwen3-6-27b-openai-compat
   - sindri-club-3090-llamacpp
   - gpt-5-3-mini
   Use: 'git log --diff-filter=D --name-only --pretty=format: -- scripts/benchmark/profiles/<id>.yaml | head -1' to find the deleting commit, then 'git show <commit>~1:scripts/benchmark/profiles/<id>.yaml' to recover.
4. Embed the resolved profile into the cell's report.json under a 'profile' key.
5. Add 'framework' and 'dataset' fields from the path's <framework-dataset> segment.
6. Mint 'cell_id' from the cell's started_at timestamp plus a random suffix.
7. Move the cell to benchmark-results/<canonical>/cells/<framework>-<dataset>/<task>/<cell-id>/ (drop profile_id and rep-NNN from path).
8. If profile is irrecoverable: 'rm -r' the cell directory; log to a manifest.

Idempotent: re-running on already-backfilled cells (those with cell.profile.* populated) is a no-op skip.

Also delete:
- benchmark-results/fiz-tools-v1/cells/.lane_aborted/* (4 marker dirs)
- benchmark-results/fiz-tools-v1/{tb21-all,or-passing,local-qwen,timing-baseline}/ (recipe-named operational subdirs; their sweep_lane_meta.json files are superseded by self-describing cells)

In-scope files:
- scripts/benchmark/backfill-cell-metadata.py (new)
- Recovered orphan profile YAMLs written to a temp dir; not committed to scripts/benchmark/profiles/
- Manifest of deleted cells written to benchmark-results/backfill-2026-05-16.log

Out-of-scope:
- Runner schema changes (PR 1c)
- Analytics switch (PR 3)

Pre-condition: PR 1c has shipped (so the schema is known) or the script accepts the schema as input.

Spec: docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-05-15-benchmark-runner-simplification.md section 'PR 2'
bead.acceptance:
1. Script runs to completion: 'python scripts/benchmark/backfill-cell-metadata.py --dry-run' lists every cell with its planned action (embed/move/delete) without modifying disk.
2. After live run: every report.json under benchmark-results/**/cells/ contains a non-empty cell.profile.* block. Verified: 'find benchmark-results -name report.json | xargs jq -r ".profile.id // empty" | grep -c "^"' returns the total cell count.
3. Zero cells reference a profile by profile_id only. 'find benchmark-results -name report.json | xargs jq -r "select(.profile == null) | input_filename"' returns nothing.
4. 'ls benchmark-results/fiz-tools-v1/cells/.lane_aborted/ 2>/dev/null' returns nothing.
5. Recipe-named operational subdirs are gone: 'ls -d benchmark-results/fiz-tools-v1/{tb21-all,or-passing,local-qwen,timing-baseline} 2>/dev/null' returns nothing.
6. 'python scripts/benchmark/backfill-cell-metadata.py' second run reports zero cells needing backfill (idempotency).
